column1: Wed, 21 Nov 2001 08:54:09 -0800 (PST),David Huckabay [mailto:DHUC@McGriff.com],"Clayton, Paul",Enron--Methanol Plant Closure,"Comments?
we need to consider meth plant reserve
its going to be difficult to justify current valuation

column2: Paul,
The Methanol Plant was shutdown during August of this year due to poor economics.  The following is a list of steps
column3: taken to prepare the plant for this outage:

column2: Lines and vessels have been purged and are mostly open to the atmosphere.
Lubricating oils have been drained from equipment, ""large oil systems"" (e.g. syn gas and recycle compressor lube
Oily water sewer and separation vessels have been washed with soap.
Chemical storage vessels have been cleaned out or removed from the plant.
Cooling tower wooden structures have been demolished and removed from the site.
Industrial gases (e.g. calibration, welding, etc.) have been removed from the plant.
Natural gas and oxygen lines to the facility have been blinded at the battery limits.
All catalyst and resins have been removed from the plant.
All firefighting equipment (e.g. fire water, monitors, extinguishers, foam, foam truck, etc.) remain in the facility
LEL monitoring equipment and the Whalen alarm system remain in service and are serviceable.
Provisions are being made for necessary periodic inspection of fire extinguishers. (Should LEL test, alarm test,
Electrical power will remain to all facilities and will be serviceable.
All current utilities to the Tank Farm/Barge Loading Facilities will remain and will be serviceable.
The process area will be secured by a six foot high chain link fence with 20' wide gates on each side at drive in
column3: points.  The gates will be locked.

column2: The oxygen compressor located in Sunoco area will be secured by a six foot high chain link fence with one pedestrian
Pipe racks on the north boundary of the plant will be within the security fence, pipe racks on the west boundary will
Admin and analyzer buildings will be locked and HVAC systems turned off.
The warehouse will continue to house a reduced level of inventory with HVAC system in service.
Please let me know if you need any additional information regarding the latest outage of the Methanol plant."
